texto: Discovery of one’s self, of one’s specific individual powers and potential capacities, learning how to develop them and use them as a socialized human being that cares about the needs of other individuals—would have to become the primary task of a new humanist education.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Mihailo Markovic sobre temas ligados a educacao. A afirmação “Discovery of one’s self, of one’s specific individual powers and potential capacities, learning h…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a educacao, humanism, reflexao, útil em momentos de reflexao.
